title: TinyFish
description: Exposes TinyFish browser-automation, search, and fetch operations as agent tools.
Provides agent_run (multi-step browser automation), search (structured web search), and fetch (URL to clean content).

tool_tinyfish.base_url.title: Base URL
tool_tinyfish.base_url.description: TinyFish API base URL (leave default unless using a custom deployment)

tool_tinyfish.default_timeout_s.title: Default Timeout (seconds)
tool_tinyfish.default_timeout_s.description: Default wall-clock timeout for agent_run when not specified per-call
